question: Which of the following best describes the unique advantages of hybrid rotary/ fixed-wing UAVs?

options.text: These UAVs combine the maneuverability of a quadcopter with the endurance of a fixed-wing UAV.
These UAVs combine the maneuverability of a fixed-wing UAV with the endurance of a quadcopter.
These UAVs can reach higher altitudes than quadcopters while flying faster than standard fixed-wing UAVS.
These UAVs use two different power sources, enabling safer flights over urban areas.

classification_notes: General UAS knowledge and UA-category topics are being tested.
